strict_data_status: strict-local-instance; the pure practice-substrate evaluator (agent-tools/src/practice-substrate) consumes this manifest and validates it against the adjacent schema. The live .agent/state/collaboration/ plane and several memory surfaces are Phase-8 / named-position forward-references not yet materialised in castr (see the human contract Current Materialisation section); their contract rows describe the intended shape.
doctor_start_gate: castr has no separate substrate-doctor workstream; the consumer is the pure practice-substrate evaluator (pnpm --filter @engraph/agent-tools practice-substrate -- check --mode report). Live collaboration-plane checks only become meaningful once the Phase-8 .agent/state/collaboration/ surfaces and their colocated schemas are materialised; until then the evaluator truthfully reports the absent plane and that signal must not be silenced.

generated_read_models.current_checker: practice-substrate evaluateSharedCommsLog regenerates from the canonical events and compares once the Phase-8 .agent/state/collaboration/comms/ root is materialised

exclusions.reason: Example fixtures inside the live directory; parse as examples, not live threads.
Fixture and schema-fixture estate for tests; never live state.

surface_defaults.stored_derived_values_rule: Allowed only when the validator recomputes and compares them.
surface_defaults.repair_preservation_rule: Do not delete, trim, or compress knowledge to satisfy fitness.

surfaces.purpose: Human-facing host-local substrate contract and index for state, memory, generated read models, historical roots, and repair routing.
surfaces.writer_or_write_api: Human edit through substrate-contract adoption, consolidation, or transplant-plan implementation.
surfaces.entry_identity: single file path plus strict manifest contract_version
surfaces.schema_or_parser: .agent/memory/executive/memory-state-substrate-contracts.manifest.json validated by .agent/memory/executive/memory-state-substrate-contracts.schema.json
surfaces.validator: strict manifest schema validation by the practice-substrate evaluator (pnpm --filter @engraph/agent-tools practice-substrate -- check)

severity.invariant: manifest omits a required surface contract field
human Markdown and strict manifest disagree semantically

repair_path.action: regenerate strict manifest from reviewed human contract
edit human contract and manifest together with reviewer evidence
delete contract content to satisfy fitness

surfaces.owner_reviewer_route: code-reviewer + type-reviewer; owner for contract-version changes

surfaces.purpose: Entry point for live and historical Practice state surfaces and their canonical communication-event root.
surfaces.writer_or_write_api: Human edit when state topology changes.
surfaces.schema_or_parser: Markdown frontmatter plus section conventions

severity.invariant: entrypoint names a retired root as live
entrypoint omits canonical live state roots
entrypoint route is stale but non-authoritative

repair_path.action: replace stale live-path references after classification
classify ambiguous archived references before editing
rewrite archived evidence to current truth

surfaces.notes: Phase-8 forward-reference: .agent/state/ is not yet materialised in castr; the contract describes the intended state-plane entrypoint.

surfaces.purpose: Canonical live immutable communication-event fragments that render to the shared communication log.
surfaces.writer_or_write_api: pnpm agent-tools:collaboration-state -- comms send
surfaces.schema_or_parser: agent-tools collaboration-state comms parser plus JSON Schema at agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/schemas/comms-event.schema.json (committed source, WS7-decoupled from the data plane); the runtime .agent/state/collaboration/comms/ event data is a Phase-8 item
surfaces.validator: pnpm agent-tools:collaboration-state -- check --comms-dir .agent/state/collaboration/comms; practice-substrate drift comparison

severity.invariant: new event written outside canonical root
generated log drift after renderer contract exists
malformed event body requiring provenance-preserving repair

repair_path.action: regenerate shared communication log from canonical events
repair malformed event only with original content preserved
delete events to make rendering pass

surfaces.notes: Phase-8 forward-reference: the live .agent/state/collaboration/ plane is not yet materialised in castr; the practice-substrate evaluator reports the absent plane until Phase-8 lands.

surfaces.purpose: Human-readable generated read model of communication-event fragments.
surfaces.writer_or_write_api: pnpm agent-tools:collaboration-state -- comms render
surfaces.entry_identity: rendered heading timestamp plus event identity from source fragment
surfaces.schema_or_parser: generated Markdown header plus renderer comparison
surfaces.validator: practice-substrate regenerates from comms-events and compares

severity.invariant: generated read model drift after comparison is installed
rendered prose has lint-sensitive formatting from source event

repair_path.action: regenerate from canonical event source set
classify source-event rendering defects before editing event
manual edits to generated log as source of truth

surfaces.notes: Phase-8 forward-reference: the generated read model does not yet exist in castr; it is rendered from the Phase-8 comms-events root.

surfaces.purpose: Live truth-of-now registry for active agent claims and advisory commit queue.

surfaces.schema_or_parser: agent-tools collaboration-state JSON Schema at agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/schemas/active-claims.schema.json (committed source, WS7-decoupled from the data plane); the runtime .agent/state/collaboration/active-claims.json data file is a Phase-8 item

repair_path.action: archive stale claims only through lifecycle helper when deterministic policy applies
owner-forced or stale closure with evidence
silent deletion of claims or queue entries

surfaces.notes: Phase-8 forward-reference: the live claims registry is not yet materialised in castr.

surfaces.purpose: Durable archive of explicit, stale, owner-forced, and commit-window claim closure evidence.

surfaces.writer_or_write_api: claim close/archive helper and commit skill closeout

severity.invariant: duplicate closed claim_id with incompatible closure evidence
same claim closed on two branches and needing semantic union

repair_path.action: exact-dedupe identical closure records
merge same-claim closure evidence with provenance
drop one branch closure because it is inconvenient

surfaces.notes: Phase-8 forward-reference: the closed-claims archive is not yet materialised in castr.

repair_path.action: format and schema-normalise unambiguous fields
resolve semantic decision conflicts through the conversation

delete unresolved escalation to reduce noise
